title: Sanji Is Trapped by the Wedding
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Jinbe, Pedro, Luffy, Nami, Sanji, Pudding as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Chugga Chooga Chugga Chooga! You fools!!

dialogue.text: We've managed to defeat team bro! <a href=" http://www.c.co/index-to-buy-essay-online-online-online-online-online-to-online-online-to-online-online-to-buy-essay-online-online-online

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now we'll be able to travel all around the island through these mirrors!

dialogue.text: It seems like the guards are having quite a hard til-

dialogue.text: Where are the ingredients I asked for?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
